sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The Pipedrive connector syncs deals, persons, organizations, and activities from Pipedrive CRM into the Shielva knowledge base using the Pipedrive REST API v1. Authentication uses a personal API token passed as a query parameter (?api_token=...) on every request. The connector implements offset-based pagination (start + limit), exponential backoff retry, circuit breaker, and stable SHA-256 source IDs to ensure reliable, idempotent data ingestion.

subsections.title: API Token (Personal)
subsections.content: Pipedrive uses a personal API token for authentication. The token is appended to every request as the ?api_token= query parameter. Find your token in Pipedrive → Settings → Personal preferences → API tab. The token grants the same permissions as the user who owns it.
steps: Click your avatar (top-right) and select Personal preferences.
Copy the 'Your personal API token' value.
Paste it into the api_key field in Shielva.

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Pipedrive personal API token from Settings → Personal preferences → API. Required.

fields.label: Company Domain
fields.description: Your Pipedrive company subdomain. Leave blank for standard cloud accounts (api.pipedrive.com).

sections.title: Sync Engine
sections.content: The sync() method performs a full paginated sync of Pipedrive deals, persons, and organizations. For each object type, it fetches all pages using Pipedrive's offset-based pagination pattern (start + limit parameters). The presence of more pages is determined by additional_data.pagination.more_items_in_collection in each response. Each raw API record is passed through a normalizer that converts it into a ConnectorDocument with a stable SHA-256 source ID.

stable_ids.example: stable_id('deal', '42') → first 16 hex chars of SHA-256('deal:42')

methods.description: Validates API key by probing GET /users/me. Returns HEALTHY + CONNECTED on success, or OFFLINE + appropriate AuthStatus on failure.
Pings GET /users/me. Returns HEALTHY, DEGRADED (transient network error, circuit not open), or OFFLINE (auth failure or circuit open). Updates the circuit breaker state.

methods.signature: async def sync(full: bool = False, since: datetime | None = None, kb_id: str = '') -> SyncResult
methods.description: Paginated full sync of deals, persons, and organizations. Returns documents_found, documents_synced, documents_failed, and a SyncStatus (COMPLETED / PARTIAL / FAILED).

methods.signature: async def list_deals(status: str = 'all', limit: int = 100, start: int = 0) -> dict
methods.description: Returns one page of Pipedrive deals. status can be 'all', 'open', 'won', 'lost', or 'deleted'.

methods.signature: async def get_deal(deal_id: int | str) -> dict
methods.description: Returns a single Pipedrive deal by ID.

methods.signature: async def list_persons(limit: int = 100, start: int = 0) -> dict
methods.description: Returns one page of Pipedrive persons.

methods.signature: async def get_person(person_id: int | str) -> dict
methods.description: Returns a single Pipedrive person by ID.

methods.signature: async def list_organizations(limit: int = 100, start: int = 0) -> dict
methods.description: Returns one page of Pipedrive organizations.

methods.signature: async def list_activities(limit: int = 100, start: int = 0) -> dict
methods.description: Returns one page of Pipedrive activities.
Closes the underlying httpx.AsyncClient and clears the http_client reference.

sections.title: Data Model
sections.description: Every Pipedrive object is normalized into a ConnectorDocument with a stable SHA-256 source ID before being ingested into the Shielva knowledge base.

fields.name: source_id
fields.description: 16-char SHA-256 hex digest of '{entity_type}:{pipedrive_id}'. Stable across re-syncs.

fields.name: title
fields.description: Human-readable title. Format varies by object type.

fields.name: content
fields.description: Newline-delimited key-value representation of the object's properties.

fields.name: source_url
fields.description: Deep link to the object in Pipedrive UI (app.pipedrive.com).

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Object-type-specific properties map. Always includes object_type key.

exceptions.name: PipedriveError
exceptions.description: Base exception. Carries message, status_code, and code.

exceptions.name: PipedriveAuthError
exceptions.description: Raised on 401 Unauthorized or 403 Forbidden. Not retried.

exceptions.name: PipedriveRateLimitError
exceptions.description: Raised on 429 Too Many Requests. Carries retry_after (seconds from Retry-After header). Retried after the specified delay.

exceptions.name: PipedriveNotFoundError
exceptions.description: Raised on 404 Not Found. Carries resource name and resource path.

exceptions.name: PipedriveNetworkError
exceptions.description: Raised on httpx.TimeoutException or httpx.NetworkError. Retried with exponential backoff.

exceptions.name: PipedriveServerError
exceptions.description: Raised on 5xx responses from Pipedrive. Retried.

items.cause: Pipedrive API token is invalid or was regenerated.
items.solution: Go to Pipedrive Settings → Personal preferences → API, copy the current token, and update the connector's api_key.

items.cause: The user account lacks read permissions for the requested resource.
items.solution: Ensure your Pipedrive user has at least read access to deals, persons, and organizations. Contact your Pipedrive admin.
The connector retries automatically with exponential backoff. For very large accounts, schedule syncs during off-peak hours.

items.cause: Transient network errors have tripped the circuit breaker (5 failures).
items.solution: Resolve the underlying network or auth issue, then trigger a health check to reset the circuit breaker.

items.cause: One or more Pipedrive records returned unexpected data that caused normalization to fail.
items.solution: Check connector logs for which record IDs failed. Inspect those records in Pipedrive for missing or null field values.
